description_long: This is a sturdy, rectangular bench featuring a seat made from three parallel wooden planks, supported by a robust black metal frame. The wood appears weathered, suggesting durability and suitability for outdoor environments. The bench has no backrest or armrests, offering a minimalist and functional design. The metal frame consists of two rectangular end supports connected by a horizontal bar for added stability. The overall construction is simple yet solid, with exposed fasteners securing the wood to the frame. Its utilitarian style makes it ideal for parks, sidewalks, or other public urban spaces.
description: A minimalist wooden bench with three planks and a black metal frame, designed for outdoor urban use. It has no backrest or armrests, emphasizing durability and simplicity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bench, highlighting the three wooden planks and the black metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the bench, with the thickness of the wooden planks and the rectangular metal leg visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the three wooden planks and the supporting metal frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same narrow profile and visible end support.
attribute_leg_design: rectangular black metal supports at each end
